heroText: IronCore Gym helps you build strength, confidence, and long-term fitness with modern equipment and expert coaching.
aboutText: We offer a welcoming training environment in central Stockholm with memberships, personal training, and group classes.

services.title: Gym Membership
services.description: Access to our full gym with flexible membership options.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one coaching tailored to your goals.

services.title: Group Classes
services.description: Join motivating classes for strength, cardio, and mobility.

faq.question: Do you offer trial sessions?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer one free trial session for new visitors.

faq.question: Do you have showers and lockers?
faq.answer: Yes, both showers and lockers are available.

chatbot.welcome: Hej! Jag är gymmets digitala assistent. Hur kan jag hjälpa dig idag?
